name: cave-tabac
description: Ma Cave à Tabac — Application iOS via Capacitor

scripts.prepare: mkdir -p www && cp index.html manifest.json sw.js icon-192.png icon-512.png www/
scripts.sync: npm run prepare && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ios: npm run sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.setver: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),v=process.argv[1],b=process.argv[2];if(!v||!b){console.error('Usage: npm run setver -- <version> <build>');process.exit(1);}let c=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');c=c.replace(/var APP_VERSION=\"[^\"]*\";var APP_BUILD=\"[^\"]*\"/,'var APP_VERSION=\"'+v+'\";var APP_BUILD=\"'+b+'\"');fs.writeFileSync('index.html',c);console.log('✅ version='+v+' build='+b);" --
